_meta.doc: Example branding override for a fictional 'Acme Language School' fork. Drop this content into N5/data/branding.json on your fork (renaming as needed) and you'll get a navy accent, custom header label, custom watermark, and a soft 'Powered by JLPTSuccess' footer attribution.

brand.name: Acme Language School
brand.footer_attribution_html: Hosted by Acme Language School · Powered by JLPTSuccess

meta.title: Acme N5 — JLPT N5 prep
meta.description: Acme Language School's offline-first JLPT N5 study programme — free for students, no login, works offline.
meta.og_title: Acme N5 — JLPT N5 prep for Acme Language School students
meta.og_description: Free, offline JLPT N5 study programme for Acme Language School. Powered by JLPTSuccess.

trust_strip.en: Acme Language School N5 · No login · No tracking · Works offline · Powered by open-source JLPTSuccess.
trust_strip.hi: एक्मे लैंग्वेज स्कूल N5 · लॉगिन नहीं · ट्रैकिंग नहीं · ऑफ़लाइन काम करता है · ओपन-सोर्स JLPTSuccess द्वारा संचालित।
